entries.title: Greenhouse Effect
entries.content: Gases (CO₂, methane) trap heat in atmosphere. Natural effect keeps Earth warm; human emissions intensify global warming.

entries.title: Renewable Energy
entries.content: Solar, wind, hydro, geothermal, and biomass replenish naturally. Key to reducing fossil fuel dependence and carbon emissions.

entries.title: Water Cycle
entries.content: Evaporation → condensation → precipitation → collection. Powers weather, distributes fresh water, and sustains ecosystems.

entries.title: Biodiversity
entries.content: Variety of life at genetic, species, and ecosystem levels. Threatened by habitat loss, pollution, and climate change.

entries.title: Carbon Footprint
entries.content: Total greenhouse gases produced by actions or organizations. Reduced by efficiency, renewables, and sustainable transport.
